selections.name: River Ride
selections.reason: Consistently posting strong speed figures (81, 79) and possesses the tactical speed to secure a great trip.

selections.name: Devilish Grin
selections.reason: Drops a field-best 80 speed figure two back and has the late kick to be a major factor.

selections.name: Blackfin (IRE)
selections.reason: Chad Brown trainee making her second lifetime start; significant improvement expected off her debut 73.

selections.name: Amicable Farce
selections.reason: Another Chad Brown runner who should appreciate the turf; capable of hitting the board.

danger_horse.name: Majestic Moonlight
danger_horse.reason: Moving up in class but showed flashes of ability; could surprise if the pace collapses.

selections.name: Tough Street
selections.reason: Class of the field with elite speed figures (98, 96, 87). Drawn perfectly to stalk the outside flow.

selections.name: Fast And Frisky
selections.reason: Flashed a massive 93 speed figure three back. If she replicates that effort, she is the main threat.

selections.name: Malu
selections.reason: Consistent runner who regularly hits the high 80s to low 90s; fits well in this pace scenario.

selections.name: Mommasgottagun
selections.reason: Capable of mid-80s speed figures and should get a ground-saving trip from the inside post.

danger_horse.name: Carol T
danger_horse.reason: Has back class but must overcome the dead rail bias from the inside draw.

selections.name: Egyptian
selections.reason: Incredibly consistent, stringing together mid-80s speed figures. The one to beat if he handles the rail.

selections.name: Come Full Circle
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly outside to utilize the track bias; recent figures of 83 and 77 put him right in the mix.

selections.name: Smallchangegeep
selections.reason: Bounced back with an 84 speed figure two starts ago; dangerous if he runs back to that effort.

selections.name: Solo Jim
selections.reason: Flashed a 75 speed figure last out and gets a favorable outside draw for the dirt route.

danger_horse.name: Resilient Hero
danger_horse.reason: Has an 82 speed figure on his resume; capable of sneaking into the exotics at a price.

selections.name: Fraudster
selections.reason: Consistently hitting the upper 70s and low 80s. Best overall speed profile in a weak field.

selections.name: Amended Dreamer
selections.reason: Posted an 82 speed figure last out; trending in the right direction and fits the class level.

selections.name: Emerald Ember
selections.reason: Has shown flashes of mid-70s speed; gets a good middle draw to stalk the pace.

selections.name: Channelview
selections.reason: Capable of low 70s speed figures; can hit the board if the top choices falter.

danger_horse.name: Bengalese
danger_horse.reason: Drops in class and could wake up against this softer competition.

selections.name: Kulapat
selections.reason: Owns a massive 95 speed figure three starts back. Class of the field if he brings his A-game.

selections.name: Sharp Spark
selections.reason: Very consistent runner with multiple 80+ speed figures; outside draw is the only concern.

selections.name: Khetam
selections.reason: Has posted 89 and 88 speed figures recently; a major player with a clean trip.

selections.name: Take A Stance
selections.reason: Flashed an 84 speed figure last out; dangerous if he can repeat that effort from an inside draw.

danger_horse.name: Hard Circle
danger_horse.reason: Capable of mid-80s speed; a logical inclusion for the bottom of exotics.

selections.name: Art Fair
selections.reason: Boasts elite speed figures (93, 90, 88) for this level and draws well to stalk the pace.

selections.name: Trust Issues
selections.reason: Incredibly consistent with figures of 91, 90, 89. Will be right there at the wire.

selections.name: Mischievous M
selections.reason: Has back-to-back strong efforts (91, 88) and gets a favorable outside draw for the dirt sprint.

selections.name: Gunner Bay
selections.reason: Solid mid-80s speed figures; must overcome the inside post but has the talent to factor.

danger_horse.name: Conniving
danger_horse.reason: Drawn perfectly on the outside and has an 84 speed figure in his recent past.

selections.name: Moment's Notice
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly outside and has posted an 86 speed figure twice recently. Prime setup.

selections.name: Thirteen G's
selections.reason: Owns an 86 speed figure and gets the ultimate outside draw to capitalize on the track bias.

selections.name: Momentum Files
selections.reason: Very consistent (82, 81, 80) but must overcome the dreaded inside rail draw.

selections.name: Corvus
selections.reason: Has an 81 speed figure and draws well outside; a must-use in exotics.

danger_horse.name: Toga D'oro
danger_horse.reason: Capable of high 70s speed; could hit the board if the pace is hot.

selections.name: I'm Mo Joke
selections.reason: Elite speed figures of 95 and 94 make her the clear class of this turf sprint.

selections.name: Griselda (FR)
selections.reason: Chad Brown trainee with strong European form and an 88 speed figure stateside.

selections.name: Mz Big Bucks
selections.reason: Has a massive 95 speed figure on her resume; very dangerous if she brings her best.

selections.name: Delightful Flame
selections.reason: Posted a 91 speed figure last out; a major threat from the rail.

danger_horse.name: Capturing
danger_horse.reason: Todd Pletcher trainee with a 91 speed figure two back; cannot be ignored.

selections.name: Presider
selections.reason: Monster speed figures (111, 105, 100) make him a standout in this field.

selections.name: Ocean Atlantique
selections.reason: Consistently hits triple-digit speed figures (105, 101); the main danger to the top pick.

selections.name: Frosted Over
selections.reason: Has back class and figures of 103, 97, 96; a must-use in all exotic wagers.

selections.name: Sardis
selections.reason: Capable of hitting 100 on his best day; rail draw could provide a ground-saving trip.

danger_horse.name: Paros
danger_horse.reason: Consistent high 90s speed figures; will be picking up the pieces late.
